title: Bulbs & Cables
description: Turns Lanterns & Chains into Bulbs & Cables!
body:
# Bulbs & Cables

Changes the **Lantern & Soul Lantern models** to **Light Bulbs** & **Chains** to **Cables**
(also works when placed on the floor so you can make cool lamp designs)

_No Optifine or Mod Required_

### Hanging Light Bulb on Cable Example:
![From Team Byte's Backrooms server](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e0491e6b0b4f4e256e17d9416eea4ec7c18b3539.png)

**More examples** in the [**Gallery**](https://modrinth.com/project/bulbs-cables/gallery)
